target.name: Alpha-synuclein
target.prediction_scope: Preview-first reference. There is no single native fold: in solution alpha-synuclein is intrinsically disordered. The 1XQ8 preview is only its micelle-bound helical state.
target.omitted_context: Preview/prediction mismatch is the lesson: 1XQ8 is a membrane-mimic conformation, while the free protein is a disordered ensemble. Treat any single predicted structure here with suspicion.
